sql_array: CREATE TABLE fuzz_test (id UInt32, value String, associated_id UInt32, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, toUInt256OrZero(value) AS converted_value FROM fuzz_test WHERE associated_id = ANY (SELECT id FROM fuzz_test WHERE value = 'abc');
SELECT id, associated_id, value, toUInt256OrZero(concat('Value: ', value)) AS concatenated_converted_value FROM fuzz_test;
SELECT created_at, toUInt256OrZero(value) AS value_converted FROM fuzz_test GROUP BY created_at HAVING value_converted = ANY (SELECT toUInt256OrZero(value) FROM fuzz_test WHERE value != '');
SELECT COUNT(*), toUInt256OrZero(value) AS value_converted FROM fuzz_test GROUP BY value_converted HAVING value_converted = ANY (SELECT toUInt256OrZero('100'));
SELECT f1.id, f2.id AS associated_id FROM fuzz_test AS f1 JOIN fuzz_test AS f2 ON toUInt256OrZero(f1.value) = f2.associated_id WHERE f1.value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT toUInt256OrZero(NULLIF(value, '')) AS null_safe_conversion FROM fuzz_test WHERE associated_id = ANY (SELECT associated_id FROM fuzz_test);
SELECT value, toUInt256OrZero(value) AS conversion_test FROM fuzz_test ORDER BY conversion_test ASC;
